testcases.input: nums = [1,2,4,6], operations = [[1,3],[4,7],[6,1]] Output: [3,2,7,1] Explanation: We perform the following operations on nums: - Replace the number 1 with 3. nums becomes [3,2,4,6]. - Replace the number 4 with 7. nums becomes [3,2,7,6]. - Replace the number 6 with 1. nums becomes [3,2,7,1]. We return the final array [3,2,7,1].
testcases.expectedOutput: [3,2,7,1] Explanation: We perform the following operations on nums: - Replace the number 1 with 3. nums becomes [3,2,4,6]. - Replace the number 4 with 7. nums becomes [3,2,7,6]. - Replace the number 6 with 1. nums becomes [3,2,7,1]. We return the final array [3,2,7,1].

testcases.input: nums = [1,2], operations = [[1,3],[2,1],[3,2]] Output: [2,1] Explanation: We perform the following operations to nums: - Replace the number 1 with 3. nums becomes [3,2]. - Replace the number 2 with 1. nums becomes [3,1]. - Replace the number 3 with 2. nums becomes [2,1]. We return the array [2,1].
